cabi-net
work writing syllabus about send a postcard ↗

My work sits at the intersection of art and technology — I enjoy building systems, tools, and images that stem from curiosity.

I believe in automation as a means for creative freedom: scripting the repetitive to make space for the things I love doing and making. I'm drawn to projects that are novel, strange, or useful — preferably all three, and ideally recursive.
